description: Overall experience is great once you clear out all the problems due to bugs.. this software just need some updates and tuneup.. everything else is great
author: Surya P.
pros: WYSIWYG functionality for generate admin panels fast
cons: Some bugs are present in this software like signup related bug

description: Overall, my experience with PHPRad has been amazing and PHPRad has exceeded many of my expectations. I have been able to accomplish many things even with minimal experience using this solution. Granted, i did have to invest some time to learn to use it but it was certainly worth-it. Once you understand how to use it, it gets very intuitive. Thumbs up to the PHPRad team for creating such an amazing tool.
author: Willard M.
pros: The product is highly affordable, and has amazing features and functionality that considerably reduce development time by far whilst still maintaining a positive professional look. Creating and deploying projects is also so easy even with minimal programming skills. Its a comprehensive solution that covers most development needs. The online documentation is also helpful and sufficient to get anyone up and running in no time.
cons: I seem to be struggling around the 'import' feature which I think does not yet work as seamlessly as it should. I also think information on how to configure reports is not well documented for novice users with minimal development experience.

description: It appears to a middle ground compared to the very absolutely confusing Scriptcase and Appgini. By the time i learn Scriptcase, as a beginner, i would have have mastered PHP, Modern JS and Codeigniter in total. My overall experience with PHPRad is that it will be a struggle to learn it in the absence of good support documents and non-silent tutorials. They forgot that its the beginners who will push the product way up.
author: Murugappan R.
pros: (1) Most of UIs and parameters LOOK very easy (2) Simple and not complicated in navigating (3) Documentation is fairly good
cons: (1) Documentation does not have examples (2) Using this for beginners to learn is a total flop (3) There is absolutely no full tutorial or documentation
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best Rad tool so far
description: It has cut short the development time taken by half.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The fact that I can add a code if I don't want to use the configurations made available for a page.
cons: The fact that there are fewer custom configurations for controllers.

author: Marlvern N.
pros: so I got the license back in 2020 in a covid -19 license giveaway for staying at home. I then wandered into programming for my school work and fun. I, later, returned to Phprad to see if I could use it on one of my class project development. I am grateful I had the license with me but it is until now that I understand how much work is needed to make one functional script and now that I compare it with phprad, I realize I had the best application ever because with it I can drag and drop and create anything in no time. thank you guys
cons: The GUI may be a bit intimidating , but once you figure it out you good to go

author: Abuchi E.
pros: Having used other frameworks, phprad is exactly what I have been looking for, easy, simple and seem less. The customer support is also top-notch. I definitely will recommend it to someone looking to develop a quick web app.
cons: I think the framework is currently serving me

description: Still not mature enough for production. Test your product and compare with SCRIPTCASE (which I use for 10 years). Scriptcase is very god product but their support sucks and it has lots of bugs. For that matter I would be interested to switch to your tool , but only if the features are the same or better.
